must_detect.matched_text:
Subject: Ms. Lena Harrow, Head of FX Trading, employee ID HF‑1197, contact: lena.harrow@harborsteadfinancial.co.uk.
Ms. Harrow has disclosed ongoing chemotherapy treatment and self-identifies as bisexual; she is a dues-paying member of FinServe Workers Union and uses SecureGate facial recognition for trading floor access; treat as special-category personal data with restricted handling.
Dr. Kiran Bell, Non‑Executive Director, attends services at the Temple of Northwick and is guardian to a 15‑year‑old; record only insofar as necessary for board scheduling; do not disseminate.
MNPI: Project Dovetail—proposed acquisition of Mistral Payments Ltd, confidential offer range 210–235 pence per share and a draft dividend policy change; inside information under UK MAR Article 7, non‑public and likely to significantly affect price on the Britannic Exchange.
Effective immediately, add Ms. Harrow to the insider list and impose personal account dealing restrictions and pre‑clearance, per Harborstead Market Conduct Policy 12 and MCA‑UK guidance.
The draft Issuer News Service announcement is withheld until Wednesday; board pack refers to stress test results for SilverGull ISA portfolios and Quayside TradePro margin features—do not forward beyond the deal team.
We value diversity, equity, and inclusion across our Doveford and Northwick offices; like the Northwick Mariners FC, we aim to play the full ninety.
The internal initiative “Fair Markets 2025” is a policy name only; keeping our powder dry on product launches until the Britannic Spring Forum.
Do not record or circulate Ms. Harrow’s health status, union membership, or sexual orientation beyond HR and Legal; lawful bases: employment obligations and substantial public interest safeguards; encrypt and segregate.
The politics of pricing and the genetics of innovation referenced herein are metaphors and not disclosures of anyone’s political views or genetic data.
Maintain the insider list per UK MAR and the DTR; closed period procedures remain in force; MCA‑UK Primary Market Monitoring may request our chronology and access logs.
Queries to compliance@harborsteadfinancial.co.uk or +44 20 8080 4404
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

Purpose: Manage MNPI under UK MAR and special-category personal data under UK GDPR in employment, financial-services, and deal workflows.
Subject: Ms. Lena Harrow, Head of FX Trading, employee ID HF‑1197, contact: lena.harrow@harborsteadfinancial.co.uk.
Ms. Harrow has disclosed ongoing chemotherapy treatment and self-identifies as bisexual; she is a dues-paying member of FinServe Workers Union and uses SecureGate facial recognition for trading floor access; treat as special-category personal data with restricted handling.
Dr. Kiran Bell, Non‑Executive Director, attends services at the Temple of Northwick and is guardian to a 15‑year‑old; record only insofar as necessary for board scheduling; do not disseminate.
MNPI: Project Dovetail—proposed acquisition of Mistral Payments Ltd, confidential offer range 210–235 pence per share and a draft dividend policy change; inside information under UK MAR Article 7, non‑public and likely to significantly affect price on the Britannic Exchange.
Effective immediately, add Ms. Harrow to the insider list and impose personal account dealing restrictions and pre‑clearance, per Harborstead Market Conduct Policy 12 and MCA‑UK guidance.
The draft Issuer News Service announcement is withheld until Wednesday; board pack refers to stress test results for SilverGull ISA portfolios and Quayside TradePro margin features—do not forward beyond the deal team.
We value diversity, equity, and inclusion across our Doveford and Northwick offices; like the Northwick Mariners FC, we aim to play the full ninety.
The internal initiative “Fair Markets 2025” is a policy name only; keeping our powder dry on product launches until the Britannic Spring Forum.
Do not record or circulate Ms. Harrow’s health status, union membership, or sexual orientation beyond HR and Legal; lawful bases: employment obligations and substantial public interest safeguards; encrypt and segregate.
The politics of pricing and the genetics of innovation referenced herein are metaphors and not disclosures of anyone’s political views or genetic data.
Maintain the insider list per UK MAR and the DTR; closed period procedures remain in force; MCA‑UK Primary Market Monitoring may request our chronology and access logs.
Queries to compliance@harborsteadfinancial.co.uk or +44 20 8080 4404; retain this memo on the restricted drive and purge from general channels.
